<?php namespace Twilio\Rest; use Twilio\Rest\Trunking\V1; class Trunking extends TrunkingBase { /** * @deprecated Use v1->trunks instead. */ protected function getTrunks(): \Twilio\Rest\Trunking\V1\TrunkList { echo "trunks is deprecated. Use v1->trunks instead."; return $this->v1->trunks; } /** * @deprecated Use v1->trunks(\$sid) instead. * @param string $sid The unique string that identifies the resource */ protected function contextTrunks(string $sid): \Twilio\Rest\Trunking\V1\TrunkContext { echo "trunks(\$sid) is deprecated. Use v1->trunks(\$sid) instead."; return $this->v1->trunks($sid); } }
